title: Excalibur | Raised Compat
description: Compatibility patch between Excalibur resourcepack and Raised mod.
body:
This **unofficial** compatibility patch ensures that textures from the [**Raised**](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised) mod seamlessly integrate with the [**Excalibur**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resourcepack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned **Raised** mod `hotbar_selection.png` texture.

For the best experience, use this pack alongside **Excalibur**.

**Special thanks to:**
- [**Maffhew**](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew) - for the **Excalibur** resourcepack.
- [**yurisuika**](https://modrinth.com/user/yurisuika) - for the **Raised** mod.

If you enjoyed this compatibility patch, feel free to tell others about it!
